arts.ttl: 'That's what': Jude Bellingham shares what Real Madrid plan to do against Arsenal in tonight's Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal took a big step towards the Champions League semi-finals last week with a 3-0 win over Real Madrid in their quarter-final first leg. Declan...

arts.ttl: Nico Williams to Arsenal: Arteta CLOSE to signing dream summer target
arts.sum: Barcelona have reportedly pulled out of contention to sign Nico Williams, leaving Arsenal in pole position to land the Athletic Club winger this summer. With Barcelona no longer contenders to land Williams, Arsenal have been given the perfect chance to sign one of Mikel Arteta’s priority transfer targets.

arts.ttl: How to watch Real Madrid vs Arsenal in UK: TV channel, live stream, Champions League kick-off time
arts.sum: Real Madrid will give it their all to turn around their 3-0 deficit from the first leg when Arsenal visit the Santiago Bernabeu for their Champions League quarter-final clash

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE | ‘People think it’s going to be a failed season’ – Jérémie Aliadière previews Real Madrid-Arsenal
arts.sum: Jérémie Aliadière sat down with Get French Football News to examine his former team, Arsenal, following their 3-0 victory over Real Madrid in the first leg of their Champions League…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Arsenal: Preview, Predictions, Lineups, TV
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Arsenal are set to clash at the Santiago Bernabéu with a trip to the Champions League semifinals on the line.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Arsenal Predicted Lineups: Champions League Quarterfinals Second Leg
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Arsenal in the second leg of the Champions League quarterfinals with their tournament berth on the line.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp tipped for new job - and Arsenal could play major part in him getting it
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp left Liverpool last summer and has since started a role as global head of soccer for Red Bull, but the German is now being linked with a sensational return to management

arts.ttl: I went to watch £38m Arsenal target and now convinced he can solve Arteta issue
arts.sum: If Arsenal had an out-an-out striker to put away chances and get them over the line in tight matches, the Gunners would have accumulated more points and edged them closer to Liverpool in the title race. Arsenal sent scouts to watch Retegui when Atalanta travelled to Young Boys in the Champions League earlier this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Champions League semi-final opponents confirmed after dramatic quarter-final tie
arts.sum: Arsenal will face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League semi-final if they can progress past Real Madrid. Leading 3-1 after the first leg at Parc des Princes, PSG travelled to England knowing they had one foot in the semi-final.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta dealt transfer blow as Real Madrid get boost for Gunners clash
arts.sum: Arsenal have travelled to Spain for their crucial Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid, arriving with a 3-0 lead on aggregate - though Mikel Arteta will be aware they cannot afford to be complacent
